data.name: Subheading
data.value: We ran into a problem while processing your request.

data.name: DevelopmentModeIntroHtml
data.value: Switching to the {0} environment shows more detailed diagnostics for this error.

data.name: DevelopmentModeWarning
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: DevelopmentModeDetailsHtml
data.value: It can expose sensitive exception details to end users. For local debugging, set the {0} environment variable to {1} and restart the app.
